blended.narrative: Castle Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,945 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
